task_title: Run tests, push branch, and open PR

pr.title: PT2 audio wrapper: pt2_mod_load_file integration, PT2_FULL_BUILD guards, module.json pt2_module sources
pr.body:
Adds real MOD file loading and conditional play/stop in the pt2_audio wrapper:
- pt2_mod_load_file integration in pt2_audio_load_mod()
- PT2_FULL_BUILD guards for modPlay/modStop/clearBlepState
- module.json updated to include pt2_module sources and -Imodules/pt2_module cflags

All 6 language tests pass (make test-quick).

codegraph.affected: No test files affected by modules/pt2_audio/pt2_audio_wrapper.c, modules/pt2_audio/module.json
codegraph.assessment: PT2 audio wrapper changes present and verified. Build and tests pass. No downstream test files affected.

assumptions: PT2 audio wrapper changes were applied in prior task task_9ba60ac (commit 612dcf4a) and already merged to main via dependency task task_28ed6301 (commit 302f389).
MAC_TASK_REPO_REMOTE contains a redacted/placeholder token; git push and gh pr create delegated to deterministic host finalizer per executor policy.
Task branch created from origin/main (commit 302f389) which already contains the PT2 changes.
repo.pushed=false reflects worker state; host finalizer sets authoritative pushed ref and PR.
